meta.title: BREAKING: America's new STEALTH FIGHTER is the Boeing F-47!
meta.description:
Earlier today, the U.S. announced the Next Generation Air Dominance fighter contract has been awarded to Boeing, to produce a new 6th generation stealth air superiority fighter dubbed the F-47.

Stay tuned for more updates about this new fighter program!
